summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no close/merge/fix path is planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr actions while several PRs have maintainer ownership, draft/waiting states, unresolved review-bot findings, or proof/check blockers.

actions.reason: Keep open for maintainer review; the PR is substantive and proof-backed, but merge/fix actions are blocked by job policy and maintainer review is explicitly required.
Keep open as related historical contributor work for the Mattermost thread-context bug; closing or treating it as fixed would need a live canonical fix/proof path that this job cannot create.
Keep open for the maintainer-owned draft path; it is a focused fix candidate but not closable or mergeable in this job.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; it is not low-signal, not a duplicate, and unresolved review findings make closure or merge inappropriate.
Keep open for maintainer/author follow-up; draft status and unresolved ClawSweeper findings block any close or merge-style conclusion.
